name: folk-music-telugu-website
description: Telugu folk songs website with Node API, MongoDB, Google Drive links, and admin dashboard

scripts.stop: sh -c 'pid=$(lsof -t -iTCP:8080 -sTCP:LISTEN 2>/dev/null | head -n1); if [ -n "$pid" ]; then kill "$pid" && echo "Stopped PID $pid on :8080"; else echo "No process listening on :8080"; fi'
scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check assets/js/common.js && node --check assets/js/data.js && node --check assets/js/songs.js && node --check assets/js/song-detail.js && node --check assets/js/artists.js && node --check assets/js/admin-login.js && node --check assets/js/admin.js
